name: Trello
description: Drive Trello (Kanban boards) from any AI agent: boards, lists, cards, members, labels, checklists, attachments-by-URL. 13 tools. API key + user token query-string auth (Trello-specific).
instructions:
This connector uses the Trello REST API v1.

**Setup**:
1. Sign in to Trello → go to https://trello.com/power-ups/admin → **+ New** to create a Power-Up (this is just the modern way to mint API keys).
2. After creation, open the Power-Up → **API key** section → copy the **API key**.
3. Below it, click **Token** → authorize the Power-Up → copy the generated user **Token**.
4. Set:
   - `TRELLO_API_KEY` = the Power-Up key (a long alphanumeric)
   - `TRELLO_TOKEN` = the user token (much longer)

**Authentication**: query-string `?key=${TRELLO_API_KEY}&token=${TRELLO_TOKEN}` on every request. The token is per-user — actions are attributed to that user. To act as a different user, mint a separate token via their Trello account.

**Hierarchy**: Workspace (Organization) → Board → List → Card. Cards have members[], labels[], checklists[], attachments[], comments (= actions of type commentCard).

**ID format**: 24-character hex (e.g. `abc123def456789012345678`). Boards / lists / cards / members all use this format. Discover board IDs via `trello_list_my_boards` → list IDs via `trello_get_board_lists` → card IDs via `trello_list_cards_in_list`.

**`fields` parameter**: virtually every endpoint accepts `?fields=all` or `?fields=comma,separated,list`. Default returns a sensible subset — for full payloads pass `fields=all`.

**Position values**: lists and cards have a `pos` (float) for ordering. `pos=top` or `pos=bottom` shortcuts work for moves; otherwise pass an explicit number between the neighbors' positions.

**Labels**: are board-level. A label has color (green/yellow/orange/red/purple/blue/sky/lime/pink/black/null) + name. Cards reference labels by their ID. Use `trello_list_board_labels` to discover IDs.

**Attachments**: upload via multipart not supported in single call. Use URL attachments via the `url` parameter — Trello fetches it.

**Webhooks** out of scope.

**Rate limits**: 100 req per 10 sec per API key, 300 per 10 sec per token. Returns 429 with `X-Rate-Limit-Api-Key-Remaining` header.

**Out of scope here**: Power-Up actions, custom fields (Power-Up only), board backgrounds, voting, plugin data, butler automations.

tools.name: trello_get_me
tools.description: Return the user the token belongs to: id, username, fullName, email, avatarUrl. Health check + whoami.

tools.name: trello_list_my_boards
tools.description: List boards the user is a member of. Each board has id, name, desc, url, closed, idOrganization.

filter.description: all, members, organization, public, open, closed, pinned, unpinned, starred.

tools.name: trello_get_board
tools.description: Fetch a board with optional nested resources (lists/cards/labels/members) via inclusion params.

lists.description: Include lists: none, all, open, closed.

cards.description: Include cards: none, all, open, closed, visible.

members.description: Include members: none, normal, admins, owners, all.

tools.name: trello_get_board_lists
tools.description: List the lists (columns) on a board.

tools.name: trello_list_cards_in_list
tools.description: List cards in a list. Each card has id, name, desc, idMembers, idLabels, due, dueComplete, shortUrl, pos.

tools.name: trello_get_card
tools.description: Fetch a single card with optional members/labels/checklists/attachments included.

tools.name: trello_create_card
tools.description: Create a card in a list. Required: idList + name. due is ISO 8601. idMembers/idLabels are comma-separated ID strings.

dueComplete.description: If true, due is marked complete.

urlSource.description: If set, attach this URL to the card on create.

tools.name: trello_update_card
tools.description: Update a card. Common: idList (move to another column), pos, due/dueComplete, name/desc, idMembers (replace whole array via comma-separated string), idLabels.

idAttachmentCover.description: Attachment ID to use as cover.

tools.name: trello_delete_card
tools.description: Permanently delete a card. Use trello_update_card with closed=true for archive (recoverable).

tools.name: trello_add_card_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to a card (creates an action of type commentCard).

tools.name: trello_attach_url_to_card
tools.description: Attach a URL (link) to a card. For file uploads use the Trello UI — multipart upload via API is not supported here.

setCover.description: If true and the URL is an image, use it as the card cover.

tools.name: trello_list_board_labels
tools.description: List labels available on a board. Returns id, name, color.

tools.name: trello_search
tools.description: Universal search across boards, cards, members and organizations. Supports the same operators as the Trello UI search (board:X, list:Y, label:Z, member:W, due:next-week, has:attachments, etc.).
